func:
// Store devices in flow context
flow.set('devices_to_format', msg.payload || []);

if (!msg.payload || msg.payload.length === 0) {
  msg.statusCode = 200;
  msg.payload = [];
  return msg;
}

// Get DevEUIs to query for latest data
const deveuiList = msg.payload
  .map(d => "'" + String(d.deveui || '').trim().toUpperCase() + "'")
  .join(',');

// Query for latest sensor data for each device (includes last uplink time)
msg.topic = [
  'SELECT',
  '  dd.deveui,',
  '  dd.recorded_at AS last_uplink_at,',
  '  dd.swt_wm1,',
  '  dd.swt_wm2,',
  '  dd.light_lux,',
  '  dd.ambient_temperature,',
  '  dd.relative_humidity,',
  '  dd.ext_temperature_c,',
  '  dd.bat_v,',
  '  dd.adc_ch0v,',
  '  dd.dendro_position_mm,',
  '  dd.dendro_valid,',
  '  dd.dendro_delta_mm,',
  '  dd.lsn50_mode_code,',
  '  dd.lsn50_mode_label,',
  '  dd.lsn50_mode_observed_at,',
  '  dd.rain_count_cumulative,',
  '  dd.rain_tips_delta,',
  '  dd.rain_mm_delta,',
  '  dd.rain_mm_per_hour,',
  '  dd.rain_mm_per_10min,',
  '  dd.rain_mm_today,',
  '  dd.rain_delta_status,',
  '  dd.flow_count_cumulative,',
  '  dd.flow_pulses_delta,',
  '  dd.flow_liters_delta,',
  '  dd.flow_liters_per_min,',
  '  dd.flow_liters_per_10min,',
  '  dd.flow_liters_today,',
  '  dd.flow_delta_status,',
  '  dd.counter_interval_seconds,',
  '  dd.barometric_pressure_hpa,',
  '  dd.wind_speed_mps,',
  '  dd.wind_direction_deg,',
  '  dd.wind_gust_mps,',
  '  dd.uv_index,',
  '  dd.rain_gauge_cumulative_mm,',
  '  dd.bat_pct',
  'FROM device_data dd',
  'INNER JOIN (',
  '  SELECT deveui, MAX(recorded_at) as max_time',
  '  FROM device_data',
  '  WHERE deveui IN (' + deveuiList + ')',
  '  GROUP BY deveui',
  ') latest ON dd.deveui = latest.deveui AND dd.recorded_at = latest.max_time'
].join('\n');

return msg;

func:
const rows = msg.payload || [];

msg.statusCode = 200;
msg.payload = rows.map(r => ({
  id: r.id,
  name: r.name,
  zone_uuid: r.zone_uuid || null,
  gateway_device_eui: r.gateway_device_eui || null,
  sync_version: Number(r.sync_version || 0),
  deleted_at: r.deleted_at || null,
  device_count: Number(r.device_count || 0),
  created_at: r.created_at,
  updated_at: r.updated_at,
  timezone: r.timezone || null,
  latitude: r.latitude || null,
  longitude: r.longitude || null,
  phenological_stage: r.phenological_stage || null,
  calibration_key: r.calibration_key || null,
  crop_type: r.crop_type || null,
  variety: r.variety || null,
  soil_type: r.soil_type || null,
  irrigation_method: r.irrigation_method || null,
  area_m2: r.area_m2 != null ? Number(r.area_m2) : null,
  irrigation_efficiency_pct: r.irrigation_efficiency_pct != null ? Number(r.irrigation_efficiency_pct) : null,
  scheduling_mode: r.scheduling_mode || 'local',
  prediction_card_enabled: Boolean(Number(r.prediction_card_enabled || 0)),
  notes: r.notes || null,
  schedule: r.trigger_metric ? {
    irrigation_zone_id: r.id,
    zone_uuid: r.zone_uuid || null,
    trigger_metric: r.trigger_metric,
    threshold_kpa: r.threshold_kpa,
    duration_minutes: r.duration_minutes,
    enabled: Boolean(r.enabled),
    last_triggered_at: r.last_triggered_at,
    response_mode: r.response_mode || 'proportional',
    sync_version: Number(r.schedule_sync_version || 0),
    deleted_at: r.schedule_deleted_at || null,
    last_applied_at: r.last_applied_at || null
  } : null
}));

return msg;

func:
msg.topic = `
  SELECT
    iz.id AS zone_id,
    iz.name AS zone_name,
    iz.user_id,
    COALESCE(iz.scheduling_mode, 'local') AS scheduling_mode,

    s.trigger_metric,
    s.threshold_kpa,
    s.duration_minutes,
    s.enabled,
    s.last_triggered_at,

    (
      SELECT d.deveui
      FROM devices d
      WHERE d.irrigation_zone_id = iz.id
        AND d.type_id = 'STREGA_VALVE'
        AND d.user_id = iz.user_id
      ORDER BY d.created_at ASC
      LIMIT 1
    ) AS valve_deveui

    ,
    zse.summary_json AS shared_environment_json,
    zse.last_received_at AS shared_environment_received_at

  FROM irrigation_zones iz
  INNER JOIN irrigation_schedules s
    ON s.irrigation_zone_id = iz.id
  LEFT JOIN zone_shared_environment zse
    ON zse.zone_uuid = iz.zone_uuid

  WHERE s.enabled = 1
    AND iz.deleted_at IS NULL

  ORDER BY iz.id ASC;
`.trim();

return msg;

func:
return (async()=>{
const _db = new osiDb.Database('/data/db/farming.db');
const exec = (sql) => new Promise((res,rej) => _db.run(sql, e => e?rej(e):res()));
const close = () => new Promise(res => _db.close(() => res()));
const gateway = (env.get('DEVICE_EUI') || 'UNKNOWN').toUpperCase();
const stmts = [
  "ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN user_uuid TEXT",
  "ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN cloud_user_id INTEGER",
  "ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN server_url TEXT",
  "ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN server_sync_token TEXT",
  "ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN server_sync_token_expires_at INTEGER",
  "ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN server_offline_verifier TEXT",
  "ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN server_offline_verifier_version INTEGER DEFAULT 0",
  "ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN last_auth_sync_at TEXT",
  "ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN last_auth_sync_status TEXT",
  "ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN last_auth_sync_error TEXT",
  "ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN edge_originated INTEGER DEFAULT 0",
  "UPDATE users SET user_uuid = lower(hex(randomblob(16))) WHERE user_uuid IS NULL OR user_uuid = ''",
  "UPDATE users SET server_offline_verifier_version = 0 WHERE server_offline_verifier_version IS NULL",
  "UPDATE users SET last_auth_sync_status = 'up_to_date' WHERE auth_mode = 'server' AND server_offline_verifier IS NOT NULL AND (last_auth_sync_status IS NULL OR last_auth_sync_status = '')",
  "CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_users_user_uuid ON users(user_uuid)",
  "ALTER TABLE irrigation_zones ADD COLUMN zone_uuid TEXT",
  "ALTER TABLE irrigation_zones ADD COLUMN gateway_device_eui TEXT",
  "ALTER TABLE irrigation_zones ADD COLUMN sync_version INTEGER DEFAULT 0",
  "ALTER TABLE irrigation_zones ADD COLUMN deleted_at DATETIME",
  "ALTER TABLE irrigation_zones ADD COLUMN area_m2 REAL",
  "ALTER TABLE irrigation_zones ADD COLUMN irrigation_efficiency_pct REAL",
  "ALTER TABLE irrigation_zones ADD COLUMN scheduling_mode TEXT DEFAULT 'local'",
  "ALTER TABLE irrigation_zones ADD COLUMN prediction_card_enabled INTEGER DEFAULT 0",
  "UPDATE irrigation_zones SET zone_uuid = lower(hex(randomblob(16))) WHERE zone_uuid IS NULL OR zone_uuid = ''",
  "UPDATE irrigation_zones SET gateway_device_eui = '" + gateway + "' WHERE gateway_device_eui IS NULL OR gateway_device_eui = ''",
  "UPDATE irrigation_zones SET sync_version = 1 WHERE COALESCE(sync_version,0) = 0",
  "UPDATE irrigation_zones SET scheduling_mode = 'local' WHERE scheduling_mode IS NULL OR scheduling_mode = ''",
  "UPDATE irrigation_zones SET prediction_card_enabled = 0 WHERE prediction_card_enabled IS NULL",
  "CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_irrigation_zones_zone_uuid ON irrigation_zones(zone_uuid)",
  "ALTER TABLE devices ADD COLUMN sync_version INTEGER DEFAULT 0",
  "ALTER TABLE devices ADD COLUMN deleted_at DATETIME",
  "ALTER TABLE devices ADD COLUMN gateway_device_eui TEXT",
  "ALTER TABLE devices ADD COLUMN strega_model TEXT",
  "ALTER TABLE devices ADD COLUMN rain_gauge_enabled INTEGER DEFAULT 0",
  "ALTER TABLE devices ADD COLUMN flow_meter_enabled INTEGER DEFAULT 0",
  "ALTER TABLE devices ADD COLUMN soil_moisture_probe_depths_json TEXT",
  "ALTER TABLE devices ADD COLUMN soil_moisture_probe_depths_configured INTEGER DEFAULT 0",
  "UPDATE devices SET gateway_device_eui = '" + gateway + "' WHERE gateway_device_eui IS NULL OR gateway_device_eui = ''",
  "UPDATE devices SET sync_version = 1 WHERE COALESCE(sync_version,0) = 0",
  "UPDATE devices SET soil_moisture_probe_depths_configured = 0 WHERE soil_moisture_probe_depths_configured IS NULL",
  "ALTER TABLE irrigation_schedules ADD COLUMN response_mode TEXT",
  "ALTER TABLE irrigation_schedules ADD COLUMN sync_version INTEGER DEFAULT 0",
  "ALTER TABLE irrigation_schedules ADD COLUMN deleted_at DATETIME",
  "ALTER TABLE irrigation_schedules ADD COLUMN last_applied_at DATETIME",
  "UPDATE irrigation_schedules SET sync_version = 1 WHERE COALESCE(sync_version,0) = 0",
  "UPDATE irrigation_schedules SET response_mode = 'proportional' WHERE response_mode IS NULL OR response_mode = ''",
  "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sync_outbox(event_uuid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, aggregate_type TEXT NOT NULL, aggregate_key TEXT NOT NULL, op TEXT NOT NULL, payload_json TEXT NOT NULL, sync_version INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, occurred_at TEXT NOT NULL, delivered_at TEXT, retry_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, gateway_device_eui TEXT)",
  "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sync_inbox(event_uuid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, processed_at TEXT NOT NULL, source_node TEXT)",
  "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sync_cursor(peer_node TEXT PRIMARY KEY, last_event_at TEXT, last_event_uuid TEXT, last_full_backfill_at TEXT)",
  "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS zone_shared_environment(zone_uuid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, zone_id INTEGER, gateway_device_eui TEXT, summary_json TEXT NOT NULL, shared_generated_at TEXT, shared_observed_at TEXT, last_received_at TEXT NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY(zone_id) REFERENCES irrigation_zones(id) ON DELETE CASCADE)",
  "CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_zone_shared_environment_zone_id ON zone_shared_environment(zone_id)",
  "CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_zone_shared_environment_received_at ON zone_shared_environment(last_received_at)",
  "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gateway_locations(gateway_device_eui TEXT PRIMARY KEY,latitude REAL,longitude REAL,altitude_m REAL,accuracy_m REAL,hdop REAL,satellites INTEGER,fix_mode INTEGER,status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'no_fix',source TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'gpsd',native_concentratord_status TEXT,chirpstack_mirror_status TEXT,last_fix_at TEXT,last_good_fix_at TEXT,sync_version INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,updated_at TEXT NOT NULL)",
  "CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_gateway_locations_updated_at ON gateway_locations(updated_at)",
  "ALTER TABLE device_data ADD COLUMN lsn50_mode_code INTEGER",
  "ALTER TABLE device_data ADD COLUMN lsn50_mode_label TEXT",
  "ALTER TABLE device_data ADD COLUMN lsn50_mode_observed_at TEXT",
  "ALTER TABLE device_data ADD COLUMN rain_mm_per_hour REAL",
  "ALTER TABLE device_data ADD COLUMN rain_delta_status TEXT",
  "ALTER TABLE device_data ADD COLUMN flow_liters_per_min REAL",
  "ALTER TABLE device_data ADD COLUMN rain_mm_per_10min REAL",
  "ALTER TABLE device_data ADD COLUMN rain_mm_today REAL",
  "ALTER TABLE device_data ADD COLUMN flow_liters_per_10min REAL",
  "ALTER TABLE device_data ADD COLUMN flow_liters_today REAL",
  "ALTER TABLE device_data ADD COLUMN flow_delta_status TEXT",
  "ALTER TABLE device_data ADD COLUMN counter_interval_seconds INTEGER",
  "ALTER TABLE device_data ADD COLUMN barometric_pressure_hpa REAL",
  "ALTER TABLE device_data ADD COLUMN wind_speed_mps REAL",
  "ALTER TABLE device_data ADD COLUMN wind_direction_deg REAL",
  "ALTER TABLE device_data ADD COLUMN wind_gust_mps REAL",
  "ALTER TABLE device_data ADD COLUMN uv_index REAL",
  "ALTER TABLE device_data ADD COLUMN rain_gauge_cumulative_mm REAL",
  "ALTER TABLE device_data ADD COLUMN bat_pct REAL",
  "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS irrigation_events(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,irrigation_zone_id INTEGER NOT NULL,action TEXT NOT NULL,reason TEXT,aggregate_kpa REAL,threshold_kpa REAL,duration_minutes INTEGER,valve_deveui TEXT,payload_json TEXT,FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,FOREIGN KEY(irrigation_zone_id) REFERENCES irrigation_zones(id) ON DELETE CASCADE)",
  "CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_irrigation_events_zone_id ON irrigation_events(irrigation_zone_id, id DESC)",
  "CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_sync_outbox_pending ON sync_outbox(delivered_at, occurred_at)",
  "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS weather_station_zones (deveui TEXT NOT NULL, zone_id INTEGER NOT NULL, created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ','now')), PRIMARY KEY (deveui, zone_id), FOREIGN KEY (deveui) REFERENCES devices(deveui) ON DELETE CASCADE, FOREIGN KEY (zone_id) REFERENCES irrigation_zones(id) ON DELETE CASCADE)",
  "CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_wsz_zone_id ON weather_station_zones(zone_id)",
  "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS devices_new (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, deveui TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL, name TEXT NOT NULL, type_id TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(type_id IN ('KIWI_SENSOR','STREGA_VALVE','DRAGINO_LSN50','TEKTELIC_CLOVER','SENSECAP_S2120')), user_id INTEGER NULL, farm_id TEXT NULL, current_state TEXT CHECK(current_state IN ('OPEN','CLOSED')), target_state TEXT CHECK(target_state IN ('OPEN','CLOSED')), created_at TEXT NOT NULL, updated_at TEXT NOT NULL, claimed_at TEXT NULL, chirpstack_app_id TEXT, irrigation_zone_id INTEGER REFERENCES irrigation_zones(id) ON DELETE SET NULL, dendro_enabled INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, temp_enabled INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, is_reference_tree INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, sync_version INTEGER DEFAULT 0, deleted_at DATETIME, gateway_device_eui TEXT, strega_model TEXT, rain_gauge_enabled INTEGER DEFAULT 0, flow_meter_enabled INTEGER DEFAULT 0, soil_moisture_probe_depths_json TEXT, soil_moisture_probe_depths_configured INTEGER DEFAULT 0, device_mode INTEGER DEFAULT 1, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL, FOREIGN KEY (farm_id) REFERENCES farms(farm_id) ON DELETE SET NULL)",
  "INSERT OR IGNORE INTO devices_new SELECT id,deveui,name,type_id,user_id,farm_id,current_state,target_state,created_at,updated_at,claimed_at,chirpstack_app_id,irrigation_zone_id,dendro_enabled,temp_enabled,is_reference_tree,sync_version,deleted_at,gateway_device_eui,strega_model,rain_gauge_enabled,flow_meter_enabled,soil_moisture_probe_depths_json,COALESCE(soil_moisture_probe_depths_configured,0),COALESCE(device_mode,1) FROM devices",
  "PRAGMA legacy_alter_table=ON",
  "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS devices_old",
  "ALTER TABLE devices RENAME TO devices_old",
  "ALTER TABLE devices_new RENAME TO devices",
  "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS devices_old",
  "PRAGMA legacy_alter_table=OFF",
  "CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_devices_user_id ON devices(user_id)",
  "CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_devices_deveui ON devices(deveui)",
  "CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_devices_farm_id ON devices(farm_id)",
  "CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_devices_irrigation_zone_id ON devices(irrigation_zone_id)"
];
for (const sql of stmts) { try { await exec(sql); } catch (_) {} }
// Self-heal broken FK refs (can be caused by devices table rename migration)
try {
  const q2 = (sql) => new Promise((res,rej) => _db.all(sql, (e,r) => e?rej(e):res(r||[])));
  const bad2 = await q2("SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND sql LIKE '%devices_old%'");
  if (bad2.length > 0) {
    const svRows = await q2('PRAGMA schema_version');
    const sv = svRows[0] ? svRows[0].schema_version : 0;
    await exec('PRAGMA writable_schema=ON');
    await exec("UPDATE sqlite_master SET sql = REPLACE(REPLACE(sql, 'REFERENCES \"devices_old\"', 'REFERENCES devices'), 'REFERENCES devices_old', 'REFERENCES devices') WHERE type='table' AND sql LIKE '%devices_old%'");
    await exec('PRAGMA writable_schema=OFF');
    await exec('PRAGMA schema_version=' + (sv + 1));
    node.warn('Self-healed FK refs for: ' + bad2.map(r=>r.name).join(', '));
  }
} catch(fkErr) { node.warn('FK self-heal failed: ' + fkErr.message); }
const triggers = [
  "DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sync_users_uuid_ai",
  "DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sync_zones_defaults_ai",
  "DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sync_zones_outbox_au",
  "DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sync_schedules_defaults_ai",
  "DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sync_schedules_outbox_au",
  "DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sync_devices_defaults_ai",
  "DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sync_devices_outbox_au",
  "CREATE TRIGGER trg_sync_users_uuid_ai AFTER INSERT ON users FOR EACH ROW WHEN NEW.user_uuid IS NULL OR NEW.user_uuid = '' BEGIN UPDATE users SET user_uuid = lower(hex(randomblob(16))) WHERE id = NEW.id; END;",
  "CREATE TRIGGER trg_sync_zones_defaults_ai AFTER INSERT ON irrigation_zones FOR EACH ROW BEGIN UPDATE irrigation_zones SET zone_uuid = COALESCE(zone_uuid, lower(hex(randomblob(16)))), gateway_device_eui = COALESCE(gateway_device_eui, '" + gateway + "'), sync_version = CASE WHEN COALESCE(sync_version,0)=0 THEN 1 ELSE sync_version END, prediction_card_enabled = COALESCE(prediction_card_enabled, 0) WHERE id = NEW.id; END;",
  "CREATE TRIGGER trg_sync_zones_outbox_au AFTER UPDATE ON irrigation_zones FOR EACH ROW WHEN COALESCE(NEW.name,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.name,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.zone_uuid,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.zone_uuid,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.gateway_device_eui,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.gateway_device_eui,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.timezone,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.timezone,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.latitude,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.latitude,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.longitude,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.longitude,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.phenological_stage,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.phenological_stage,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.calibration_key,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.calibration_key,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.crop_type,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.crop_type,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.variety,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.variety,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.soil_type,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.soil_type,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.irrigation_method,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.irrigation_method,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.area_m2,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.area_m2,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.irrigation_efficiency_pct,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.irrigation_efficiency_pct,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.scheduling_mode,'local') <> COALESCE(OLD.scheduling_mode,'local') OR COALESCE(NEW.prediction_card_enabled,0) <> COALESCE(OLD.prediction_card_enabled,0) OR COALESCE(NEW.notes,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.notes,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.deleted_at,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.deleted_at,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.sync_version,0) <> COALESCE(OLD.sync_version,0) BEGIN INSERT INTO sync_outbox(event_uuid, aggregate_type, aggregate_key, op, payload_json, sync_version, occurred_at, gateway_device_eui) VALUES (lower(hex(randomblob(16))), 'ZONE', COALESCE(NEW.zone_uuid, lower(hex(randomblob(16)))), CASE WHEN NEW.deleted_at IS NOT NULL THEN 'ZONE_DELETED' ELSE 'ZONE_UPSERTED' END, json_object('zone_uuid', NEW.zone_uuid, 'name', NEW.name, 'gateway_device_eui', COALESCE(NEW.gateway_device_eui, '" + gateway + "'), 'timezone', NEW.timezone, 'latitude', NEW.latitude, 'longitude', NEW.longitude, 'phenological_stage', NEW.phenological_stage, 'calibration_key', NEW.calibration_key, 'crop_type', NEW.crop_type, 'variety', NEW.variety, 'soil_type', NEW.soil_type, 'irrigation_method', NEW.irrigation_method, 'area_m2', NEW.area_m2, 'irrigation_efficiency_pct', NEW.irrigation_efficiency_pct, 'scheduling_mode', COALESCE(NEW.scheduling_mode, 'local'), 'prediction_card_enabled', COALESCE(NEW.prediction_card_enabled, 0), 'notes', NEW.notes, 'sync_version', NEW.sync_version, 'deleted_at', NEW.deleted_at, 'user', json_object('user_uuid', (SELECT user_uuid FROM users WHERE id = NEW.user_id), 'username', (SELECT username FROM users WHERE id = NEW.user_id), 'cloudUserId', (SELECT cloud_user_id FROM users WHERE id = NEW.user_id))), NEW.sync_version, strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ','now'), COALESCE(NEW.gateway_device_eui, '" + gateway + "')); END;",
  "CREATE TRIGGER trg_sync_schedules_defaults_ai AFTER INSERT ON irrigation_schedules FOR EACH ROW BEGIN UPDATE irrigation_schedules SET sync_version = CASE WHEN COALESCE(sync_version,0)=0 THEN 1 ELSE sync_version END, response_mode = COALESCE(response_mode,'proportional') WHERE id = NEW.id; END;",
  "CREATE TRIGGER trg_sync_schedules_outbox_au AFTER UPDATE ON irrigation_schedules FOR EACH ROW WHEN COALESCE(NEW.trigger_metric,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.trigger_metric,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.threshold_kpa,0) <> COALESCE(OLD.threshold_kpa,0) OR COALESCE(NEW.enabled,0) <> COALESCE(OLD.enabled,0) OR COALESCE(NEW.duration_minutes,0) <> COALESCE(OLD.duration_minutes,0) OR COALESCE(NEW.response_mode,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.response_mode,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.deleted_at,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.deleted_at,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.sync_version,0) <> COALESCE(OLD.sync_version,0) BEGIN INSERT INTO sync_outbox(event_uuid, aggregate_type, aggregate_key, op, payload_json, sync_version, occurred_at, gateway_device_eui) VALUES (lower(hex(randomblob(16))), 'SCHEDULE', COALESCE((SELECT zone_uuid FROM irrigation_zones WHERE id = NEW.irrigation_zone_id AND deleted_at IS NULL), ''), 'SCHEDULE_UPSERTED', json_object('zone_uuid', (SELECT zone_uuid FROM irrigation_zones WHERE id = NEW.irrigation_zone_id AND deleted_at IS NULL), 'trigger_metric', NEW.trigger_metric, 'threshold_kpa', NEW.threshold_kpa, 'enabled', NEW.enabled, 'duration_minutes', NEW.duration_minutes, 'response_mode', NEW.response_mode, 'sync_version', NEW.sync_version, 'deleted_at', NEW.deleted_at, 'last_applied_at', NEW.last_applied_at), NEW.sync_version, strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ','now'), (SELECT gateway_device_eui FROM irrigation_zones WHERE id = NEW.irrigation_zone_id AND deleted_at IS NULL)); END;",
  "CREATE TRIGGER trg_sync_devices_defaults_ai AFTER INSERT ON devices FOR EACH ROW BEGIN UPDATE devices SET gateway_device_eui = COALESCE(gateway_device_eui, '" + gateway + "'), sync_version = CASE WHEN COALESCE(sync_version,0)=0 THEN 1 ELSE sync_version END WHERE deveui = NEW.deveui; END;",
  "CREATE TRIGGER trg_sync_devices_outbox_au AFTER UPDATE ON devices FOR EACH ROW WHEN COALESCE(NEW.user_id,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.user_id,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.irrigation_zone_id,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.irrigation_zone_id,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.dendro_enabled,0) <> COALESCE(OLD.dendro_enabled,0) OR COALESCE(NEW.temp_enabled,0) <> COALESCE(OLD.temp_enabled,0) OR COALESCE(NEW.rain_gauge_enabled,0) <> COALESCE(OLD.rain_gauge_enabled,0) OR COALESCE(NEW.flow_meter_enabled,0) <> COALESCE(OLD.flow_meter_enabled,0) OR COALESCE(NEW.is_reference_tree,0) <> COALESCE(OLD.is_reference_tree,0) OR COALESCE(NEW.name,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.name,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.strega_model,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.strega_model,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.soil_moisture_probe_depths_json,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.soil_moisture_probe_depths_json,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.soil_moisture_probe_depths_configured,0) <> COALESCE(OLD.soil_moisture_probe_depths_configured,0) OR COALESCE(NEW.deleted_at,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.deleted_at,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.sync_version,0) <> COALESCE(OLD.sync_version,0) BEGIN INSERT INTO sync_outbox(event_uuid, aggregate_type, aggregate_key, op, payload_json, sync_version, occurred_at, gateway_device_eui) VALUES (lower(hex(randomblob(16))), 'DEVICE', NEW.deveui, CASE WHEN OLD.user_id IS NOT NULL AND NEW.user_id IS NULL THEN 'DEVICE_UNCLAIMED' WHEN COALESCE(OLD.irrigation_zone_id,'') <> COALESCE(NEW.irrigation_zone_id,'') AND NEW.irrigation_zone_id IS NULL THEN 'DEVICE_UNASSIGNED' WHEN COALESCE(OLD.irrigation_zone_id,'') <> COALESCE(NEW.irrigation_zone_id,'') AND NEW.irrigation_zone_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'DEVICE_ASSIGNED' ELSE 'DEVICE_FLAGS_UPDATED' END, json_object('device_eui', NEW.deveui, 'name', NEW.name, 'type', NEW.type_id, 'claimed_user_uuid', (SELECT user_uuid FROM users WHERE id = NEW.user_id), 'claimed_by_username', (SELECT COALESCE(server_username, username) FROM users WHERE id = NEW.user_id), 'zone_uuid', (SELECT zone_uuid FROM irrigation_zones WHERE id = NEW.irrigation_zone_id AND deleted_at IS NULL), 'dendro_enabled', NEW.dendro_enabled, 'temp_enabled', NEW.temp_enabled, 'rain_gauge_enabled', NEW.rain_gauge_enabled, 'flow_meter_enabled', NEW.flow_meter_enabled, 'is_reference_tree', NEW.is_reference_tree, 'strega_model', NEW.strega_model, 'soil_moisture_probe_depths_json', json(COALESCE(NEW.soil_moisture_probe_depths_json, '{}')), 'soil_moisture_probe_depths_configured', COALESCE(NEW.soil_moisture_probe_depths_configured, 0), 'gateway_device_eui', COALESCE(NEW.gateway_device_eui, '" + gateway + "'), 'sync_version', NEW.sync_version, 'deleted_at', NEW.deleted_at), NEW.sync_version, strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ','now'), COALESCE(NEW.gateway_device_eui, '" + gateway + "')); END;",
  "DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_gateway_locations_outbox_ai",
  "DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_gateway_locations_outbox_au",
  "CREATE TRIGGER trg_gateway_locations_outbox_ai AFTER INSERT ON gateway_locations FOR EACH ROW BEGIN INSERT INTO sync_outbox(event_uuid, aggregate_type, aggregate_key, op, payload_json, sync_version, occurred_at, gateway_device_eui) VALUES (lower(hex(randomblob(16))), 'GATEWAY_LOCATION', NEW.gateway_device_eui, 'GATEWAY_LOCATION_UPSERTED', json_object('gateway_device_eui', NEW.gateway_device_eui, 'latitude', NEW.latitude, 'longitude', NEW.longitude, 'altitude_m', NEW.altitude_m, 'accuracy_m', NEW.accuracy_m, 'hdop', NEW.hdop, 'satellites', NEW.satellites, 'fix_mode', NEW.fix_mode, 'status', NEW.status, 'source', NEW.source, 'native_concentratord_status', NEW.native_concentratord_status, 'chirpstack_mirror_status', NEW.chirpstack_mirror_status, 'last_fix_at', NEW.last_fix_at, 'last_good_fix_at', NEW.last_good_fix_at, 'sync_version', NEW.sync_version, 'updated_at', NEW.updated_at), NEW.sync_version, strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ','now'), NEW.gateway_device_eui); END;",
  "CREATE TRIGGER trg_gateway_locations_outbox_au AFTER UPDATE ON gateway_locations FOR EACH ROW WHEN COALESCE(NEW.latitude,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.latitude,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.longitude,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.longitude,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.altitude_m,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.altitude_m,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.accuracy_m,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.accuracy_m,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.hdop,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.hdop,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.satellites,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.satellites,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.fix_mode,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.fix_mode,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.status,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.status,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.source,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.source,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.native_concentratord_status,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.native_concentratord_status,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.chirpstack_mirror_status,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.chirpstack_mirror_status,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.last_good_fix_at,'') <> COALESCE(OLD.last_good_fix_at,'') OR COALESCE(NEW.sync_version,0) <> COALESCE(OLD.sync_version,0) BEGIN INSERT INTO sync_outbox(event_uuid, aggregate_type, aggregate_key, op, payload_json, sync_version, occurred_at, gateway_device_eui) VALUES (lower(hex(randomblob(16))), 'GATEWAY_LOCATION', NEW.gateway_device_eui, 'GATEWAY_LOCATION_UPSERTED', json_object('gateway_device_eui', NEW.gateway_device_eui, 'latitude', NEW.latitude, 'longitude', NEW.longitude, 'altitude_m', NEW.altitude_m, 'accuracy_m', NEW.accuracy_m, 'hdop', NEW.hdop, 'satellites', NEW.satellites, 'fix_mode', NEW.fix_mode, 'status', NEW.status, 'source', NEW.source, 'native_concentratord_status', NEW.native_concentratord_status, 'chirpstack_mirror_status', NEW.chirpstack_mirror_status, 'last_fix_at', NEW.last_fix_at, 'last_good_fix_at', NEW.last_good_fix_at, 'sync_version', NEW.sync_version, 'updated_at', NEW.updated_at), NEW.sync_version, strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ','now'), NEW.gateway_device_eui); END;",

  "CREATE TRIGGER trg_dp_dendro_readings_outbox_ai AFTER INSERT ON dendrometer_readings FOR EACH ROW BEGIN INSERT INTO sync_outbox(event_uuid, aggregate_type, aggregate_key, op, payload_json, sync_version, occurred_at, gateway_device_eui) VALUES (lower(hex(randomblob(16))), 'DENDRO_READING', COALESCE(NEW.deveui, '') || '|' || COALESCE(NEW.recorded_at, ''), 'DENDRO_READING_APPENDED', json_object('device_eui', NEW.deveui, 'position_um', NEW.position_um, 'adc_v', NEW.adc_v, 'bat_v', NEW.bat_v, 'is_valid', NEW.is_valid, 'invalid_reason', NEW.invalid_reason, 'is_outlier', NEW.is_outlier, 'recorded_at', NEW.recorded_at, 'zone_id', (SELECT irrigation_zone_id FROM devices WHERE deveui = NEW.deveui AND deleted_at IS NULL), 'zone_uuid', (SELECT iz.zone_uuid FROM devices d LEFT JOIN irrigation_zones iz ON iz.id = d.irrigation_zone_id AND iz.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE d.deveui = NEW.deveui AND d.deleted_at IS NULL), 'gateway_device_eui', COALESCE((SELECT gateway_device_eui FROM devices WHERE deveui = NEW.deveui AND deleted_at IS NULL), '" + gateway + "')), 0, strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ','now'), COALESCE((SELECT gateway_device_eui FROM devices WHERE deveui = NEW.deveui AND deleted_at IS NULL), '" + gateway + "')); END;",

  "CREATE TRIGGER trg_dp_zone_recs_outbox_ai AFTER INSERT ON zone_daily_recommendations FOR EACH ROW BEGIN INSERT INTO sync_outbox(event_uuid, aggregate_type, aggregate_key, op, payload_json, sync_version, occurred_at, gateway_device_eui) VALUES (lower(hex(randomblob(16))), 'ZONE_RECOMMENDATION', COALESCE((SELECT zone_uuid FROM irrigation_zones WHERE id = NEW.zone_id AND deleted_at IS NULL), '') || '|' || COALESCE(NEW.date, ''), 'ZONE_RECOMMENDATION_UPSERTED', json_object('zone_id', NEW.zone_id, 'zone_uuid', (SELECT zone_uuid FROM irrigation_zones WHERE id = NEW.zone_id AND deleted_at IS NULL), 'date', NEW.date, 'gateway_device_eui', COALESCE((SELECT gateway_device_eui FROM irrigation_zones WHERE id = NEW.zone_id AND deleted_at IS NULL), '" + gateway + "'), 'zone_stress_summary', NEW.zone_stress_summary, 'rainfall_mm', NEW.rainfall_mm, 'water_delivered_liters', NEW.water_delivered_liters, 'irrigation_action', NEW.irrigation_action, 'action_reasoning', NEW.action_reasoning, 'recommendation_json', NEW.recommendation_json, 'rain_suppression_active', NEW.rain_suppression_active, 'recovery_verification_active', NEW.recovery_verification_active, 'vpd_max_kpa', NEW.vpd_max_kpa, 'vpd_source', NEW.vpd_source, 'irrigation_window_json', NEW.irrigation_window_json, 'usable_tree_count', NEW.usable_tree_count, 'low_confidence_tree_count', NEW.low_confidence_tree_count, 'outlier_filtered_tree_count', NEW.outlier_filtered_tree_count, 'zone_confidence_score', NEW.zone_confidence_score, 'computed_at', NEW.computed_at), 0, strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ','now'), COALESCE((SELECT gateway_device_eui FROM irrigation_zones WHERE id = NEW.zone_id AND deleted_at IS NULL), '" + gateway + "')); END;",
  "CREATE TRIGGER trg_dp_zone_recs_outbox_au AFTER UPDATE ON zone_daily_recommendations FOR EACH ROW BEGIN INSERT INTO sync_outbox(event_uuid, aggregate_type, aggregate_key, op, payload_json, sync_version, occurred_at, gateway_device_eui) VALUES (lower(hex(randomblob(16))), 'ZONE_RECOMMENDATION', COALESCE((SELECT zone_uuid FROM irrigation_zones WHERE id = NEW.zone_id AND deleted_at IS NULL), '') || '|' || COALESCE(NEW.date, ''), 'ZONE_RECOMMENDATION_UPSERTED', json_object('zone_id', NEW.zone_id, 'zone_uuid', (SELECT zone_uuid FROM irrigation_zones WHERE id = NEW.zone_id AND deleted_at IS NULL), 'date', NEW.date, 'gateway_device_eui', COALESCE((SELECT gateway_device_eui FROM irrigation_zones WHERE id = NEW.zone_id AND deleted_at IS NULL), '" + gateway + "'), 'zone_stress_summary', NEW.zone_stress_summary, 'rainfall_mm', NEW.rainfall_mm, 'water_delivered_liters', NEW.water_delivered_liters, 'irrigation_action', NEW.irrigation_action, 'action_reasoning', NEW.action_reasoning, 'recommendation_json', NEW.recommendation_json, 'rain_suppression_active', NEW.rain_suppression_active, 'recovery_verification_active', NEW.recovery_verification_active, 'vpd_max_kpa', NEW.vpd_max_kpa, 'vpd_source', NEW.vpd_source, 'irrigation_window_json', NEW.irrigation_window_json, 'usable_tree_count', NEW.usable_tree_count, 'low_confidence_tree_count', NEW.low_confidence_tree_count, 'outlier_filtered_tree_count', NEW.outlier_filtered_tree_count, 'zone_confidence_score', NEW.zone_confidence_score, 'computed_at', NEW.computed_at), 0, strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ','now'), COALESCE((SELECT gateway_device_eui FROM irrigation_zones WHERE id = NEW.zone_id AND deleted_at IS NULL), '" + gateway + "')); END;",
  "CREATE TRIGGER trg_dp_irrigation_events_outbox_ai AFTER INSERT ON irrigation_events FOR EACH ROW BEGIN INSERT INTO sync_outbox(event_uuid, aggregate_type, aggregate_key, op, payload_json, sync_version, occurred_at, gateway_device_eui) VALUES (lower(hex(randomblob(16))), 'IRRIGATION_EVENT', CAST(NEW.id AS TEXT), 'IRRIGATION_EVENT_APPENDED', json_object('event_id', NEW.id, 'user_id', NEW.user_id, 'irrigation_zone_id', NEW.irrigation_zone_id, 'zone_uuid', (SELECT zone_uuid FROM irrigation_zones WHERE id = NEW.irrigation_zone_id AND deleted_at IS NULL), 'gateway_device_eui', COALESCE((SELECT gateway_device_eui FROM irrigation_zones WHERE id = NEW.irrigation_zone_id AND deleted_at IS NULL), '" + gateway + "'), 'action', NEW.action, 'reason', NEW.reason, 'aggregate_kpa', NEW.aggregate_kpa, 'threshold_kpa', NEW.threshold_kpa, 'duration_minutes', NEW.duration_minutes, 'valve_deveui', NEW.valve_deveui, 'payload_json', NEW.payload_json), 0, strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ','now'), COALESCE((SELECT gateway_device_eui FROM irrigation_zones WHERE id = NEW.irrigation_zone_id AND deleted_at IS NULL), '" + gateway + "')); END;"
];
for (const sql of triggers) { try { await exec(sql); } catch (e) { node.warn('Sync init SQL failed: ' + e.message); } }
await close();
node.status({fill:'green',shape:'dot',text:'sync ready'});
return null;
})().catch(err => { node.error('Sync init failed: ' + err.message); return null; });
